project_type: AWS CDK with C# (.NET 8 target, .NET 9 SDK)
build_system: dotnet CLI + CDK CLI (npx cdk synth)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" dotnet test' from src/ to verify all tests pass. 2. Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth' from repo root to verify CloudFormation synthesis.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - .NET 9 SDK and Node 22 are pre-installed. Must use NODE_OPTIONS="" for all dotnet test and cdk synth commands due to sandbox environment issue with JSII child process.
environment_constraints: NODE_OPTIONS env var contains '--require /opt/amazon/kiro-agent/proxy-bootstrap.js' which breaks JSII. Must prepend NODE_OPTIONS="" to all dotnet test and cdk commands. Network mode is COMMON_DEPENDENCIES (package registries available).
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then implement minimal code. Use L2 constructs. Maintain least-privilege IAM. Update ARCHITECTURE.md after changes. Conventional commit messages.
key_patterns: Tests use Template.FromStack() with FindResources/HasResourceProperties patterns. JsonSerializer.Serialize is used to inspect serialized state machine definitions. State machine uses Chain.Start().Next() pattern with AddCatch for error handling. Lambda code in src/CdkBase/lambda/process_audio/index.py. CustomState used for Polly SDK integration.
directory_structure: Root: cdk.json, docs/. src/CdkBase/: main CDK stack (CdkBaseStack.cs, Program.cs), lambda/process_audio/index.py. src/CdkBase.Tests/: test file CdkBaseStackTest.cs.
